resources.string: Type
Type
A minimal black-and-white keyboard for the Light Phone. Two quick steps:
1. Enable Type
2. Choose it as your keyboard
✓ Enabled
Setup complete. It will appear in every text field. Swipe down on the keyboard to close it.
Autocorrect

Fix misspellings as you type, using a dictionary that also learns the words you use. Works fully offline. English is built in; every other language downloads its dictionary when you turn it on in Languages.
‹ Back
Glide typing
Type a word by sliding your finger across its letters without lifting. Tap typing still works exactly as before. Off by default.
Suggestion bar
Show a strip of tap-able word completions above the keys as you type. Off by default to keep the keyboard minimal.
Languages

Choose which languages the globe key cycles through. Each has its own layout and long-press accents. Only English includes autocorrect built in; every other language downloads its dictionary automatically when you turn it on (works offline afterwards). With voice on, each language (except Hebrew) can download an offline voice model too.
Download offline autocorrect (~0.6 MB)
Downloading dictionary… %1$d%%
Offline autocorrect ready · tap to delete
Download failed: %1$s · tap to retry
Download offline voice (~%1$d MB)
Downloading voice… %1$d%%
Offline voice ready · tap to delete
Voice download failed: %1$s · tap to retry
Number row
Show a row of numbers above the letters.
Language on space bar
When more than one language is enabled, show the active one\'s code (EN / NL / RU …) on the space bar.
Auto-capitalize
Capitalize the first letter of each sentence (English).
Double-space for period
Tap the space bar twice to insert “. ”.
Vibration strength on each key press. Tap to cycle.
Key-press sound
Play the system click on each key press (follows your device\'s sound-effect volume).
How long to hold a key before its symbol or accents pop up. Tap to cycle.
How far you slide on the space bar to move the cursor one step. Tap to cycle.
Overall keyboard height. Tap to cycle.
Tip: hold the globe key (⚙) on the keyboard for a quick-settings panel — haptics, autocorrect, auto-capitalize, double-space and keyboard size, without leaving the app you\'re in.
Emoji
Tap to choose which emoji appear in the keyboard\'s emoji panel. Dim = hidden.
My words
Words the keyboard learned as you typed. Tap a word to forget it.
No saved words yet. As you type new words, they\'ll be added here.
Clear all words
+ %1$d more
Voice dictation
Private, on-device dictation. Download each language\'s offline model in Settings → Languages. (Hebrew has no offline model — it uses the phone\'s own voice service, if it has one.)
English
עברית
Typing
Autocorrect, suggestions, gesture typing, my words, voice dictation.
Keys & feel
Haptics, sound, key timing, cursor swipe, keyboard size.
Colour filter
Colour apps, hardware keymaps and close-on-lock for the phone\'s grayscale.
Choose your languages and download their dictionaries and voice models.
Colour filter: the phone stays in grayscale; the options below pause it per app. Requires the colour service.
One-time setup over adb: adb shell pm grant app.lightphonekeyboard android.permission.WRITE_SECURE_SETTINGS
Colour service
Enable the "Type colour filter" accessibility service. It only watches which app is in front — it never reads screen content.
Colour apps
Apps that always open in full colour. Grayscale returns the moment you leave them.
Give the current app colour from a hardware key; grayscale returns when you leave it. Inactive on the home screen. Camera long-press keeps short-press opening the camera.
Open the system recent-apps screen from a hardware key. Inactive on the home screen. If it shares a gesture with the colour keymap, colour wins.
Close apps on lock
When the screen locks, close the apps used since the last lock. Apps with active playback or calls survive.
Type colour filter

Detects which app is in the foreground so the grayscale filter can be paused for your chosen colour apps and restored afterwards, and listens for the colour keymap keys. It does not read any screen content.
Grayscale on
Colour on until you leave this app
Missing WRITE_SECURE_SETTINGS — see Settings for the adb command
